content.en:
"The Silver Demon Controller apologizes to the Infinite Master, and gives a gift?"

Many of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords thought all this was too dreamy.

"Leave the stuff, get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Yes!"

The Silver Demon controller left the things behind, and the man ran away.

Although Ye Tian's attitude is not good, but if he has a gift, at least he will not attack him, and this matter can be regarded as truly over.

"Everyone, please!"

Ye Tian changed his smiling face and greeted the Blue Lotus Masters and White Beard Masters as guests as guests in their Terran territory, and those Peak Legendary Realm Lords were also invited.

All of a sudden, the Terran territory became extremely lively.

For a period of time, after the Eternal Masters had all left, Ye Tian was ready to test whether his replication physical ability could be used again.

It would be terrifying if it could be used again.

After all, the other Eternal Masters only have one body, and if he has many, the advantage is too great.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian urged the copying talent and began to copy his body.

"Can be copied!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

However, the speed of replication is somewhat slow and consumes a lot of energy.

Ye Tian took out one resource treasure after another to speed up the process of replication, and it still took nearly one-tenth of a boundary river year to completely copy the replica body.

Just when Ye Tian wanted to copy the second body, he found that he couldn't copy it.

"It seems that you can only copy one body, but this can be regarded as breaking the rules of the boundary river, which is already very good!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, he can incarnate hundreds of millions with a single thought, and each doppelganger has the cultivation of a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Therefore, it is still very convenient to do things on a regular basis.

"I have to go to Wanyuan Mountain. "

Ye Tian then tore through time and space and came to Wanyuan Mountain.

You can enter Wanyuan Mountain at any time, which is also the treatment of being a disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Wanyuan Mountain.

Ye Tian specially came to visit Shizun, because Shizun said that when he broke through to the realm of the Eternal Master, he would give him a great opportunity, so he came to ask for a great opportunity.

"Master!"

Ye Tian saw the Ten Elements Ancestor and bent down respectfully.

The Ten Elements Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian and nodded slightly: "Very good, I have been promoted to the Eternal Controller realm with the most perfect foundation, and my will has also reached the early stage of the ninth order." With your current strength, you have reached the six-domain level combat power. "

Six Domains!

Ye Tian didn't understand the division of the strength of the Eternal Master's level, because he hadn't asked too much about the Eternal Master's level before, after all, he hadn't broken through to the Eternal Master, and knowing too much would only distract him.

But now, he's qualified to know.

So, Ye Tian asked, "Master, how is the realm of the Eternal Controller divided?"

The Ten Elements Ancestor introduced with a smile: "There is no specific realm division for the Eternal Master, because the Eternal Controller itself is a realm, but according to the strength of the strength, it can be divided into a domain-level combat power to a ten-domain level combat power, and above the ten-domain level combat power, it is also called the first realm level, the second realm level, and all the way to the ten realms combat power. The combat power of the Ten Realms is also the peak realm, and it is also the limit that the Eternal Controller can reach in theory. "

"What about Master?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Me?" Ten Elements Ancestor said lightly: "I have surpassed the combat power of the Ten Realms, but I have not stepped into the next realm, because the known realm is the eternal master, and there is no way to go up, and now there are several strong people like me, and we can't create the next realm, so I like to recruit geniuses, hoping to cultivate an existence that can break the way forward and create a new realm." "

"I see!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, the Ten Elements Ancestor told Ye Tian how to continue his cultivation in the Eternal Master.

First, it can improve the will power, such as the will of Ye Tiancai in the early stage of the ninth order, so he can continue to improve the will.

The second is that you can create the Origin Control Technique, the Origin Control Technique is a move that surpasses the top space-time control skills, and once you create an Origin Control Technique, the strength will reach a very strong level.

The third is to strengthen the body of the controller of the eternal controller, and the physical body will be strong, and the strength will be incomparably strong. At the level of the Eternal Master, the Body of Control can be divided into ten levels, and most of the bodies of the Eternal Masters are only the first level of the Body of Control, and there is no chance to continue to improve, and you have devoured the Sea of Darkness, and the life level is too high, which makes you reach the fourth level of the Body of Control as soon as you break through to the Eternal Master.

The physical life level is the foundation, and the better the foundation, the easier it is to improve the strength of the physical body.

The fourth is to improve the power of control, which is also the only way that many eternal masters who have just broken through can improve, but the strength improvement that can be obtained by improving the power of control is very limited, and the first three ways are the ones that can really make the strength skyrocket.

"Thank you for your advice!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Abrupt.

Shixing Ancestor smiled and said: "You are here to ask for a great opportunity, I promised you for the teacher, and after you break through, I will give you a great opportunity, and I will give it to you now." "

Ye Tian was overjoyed when he heard this, and waited quietly.

I saw that the Ten Elements Ancestor gave Ye Tian a map with a location marked on it.

"This is the Xuanlei Black Valley of the Thirteenth Boundary River, the Xuanlei Black Valley is very dangerous, but there is a Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit growing in it, and this fruit needs thirty-three million Boundary River years to grow. The Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit is very helpful to your controlling body, under normal circumstances, an Eternal Controller can only refine one, and your life level is very high, and you can refine many Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits. If you have obtained enough Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, enough to increase the Body of Control from level four to level five, your strength will skyrocket. Xuanlei Black Valley is located in a special time and space, and it is not possible to enter it under normal circumstances, but you can enter it with the Xuanlei Seal in hand. As a teacher, I will give you a Xuanlei seal, and then you will go to Xuanlei Black Valley. "

As he spoke, the Ten Elements Ancestor threw over another Xuanlei Seal.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian ordered the Xuan Lei Seal and the map.

"Okay, let's go, the road in the future is mainly on your own, and the teacher can only occasionally give you a little advice, so that you don't take detours, that's all. If the future path is paved for the teacher, you will not be able to walk out of your own path, and there will be no way to break the shackles in the future and surpass the combat power of the Ten Realms Masters. The Ten Elements Ancestor said lightly.

Ye Tian understood, just let him practice on his own, and the benefits given by the master were so much, don't keep thinking about finding him for a chance.

"The disciple has retreated!"

Ye Tian left Wanyuan Mountain and immediately followed the location on the map to the Xuanlei Black Valley.
